texto: Lhyn watched her with a smile. “You do realize that’s your fourth cup and it’s not even midmeal. Shouldn’t you be starting a bit lower than full addict level?” “I am a full addict; what’s the use in pretending? Besides, it’s only three and a half cups.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Fletcher DeLancey que provoca temas ligados a humor. Ao questionar “Lhyn watched her with a smile. “You do realize that’s your fourth cup and it’s not even midmeal. …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre humor, addiction, tea, com foco em termino e humor.
